name: MoneyApp
observations: Personal finance web app for managing expenses, incomes, invoices/bills
Single-user, self-hosted application
Go module: github.com/beohoang98/moneyapp
Repository at /Users/beohoang98/0_projects/learn-go/moneyapp
Project started around April 2026

Milestone 0 (Project Foundation) implemented as of April 2026: migrations, env config, API middleware/JSON helpers, health with DB + storage, Dockerfiles + Compose, GitHub Actions CI, React app shell with router, API client, toast stack
Knowledge graph files live in repo under .aim/ (project-local); Aim MCP defaults to project when .aim exists
M1 MVP implementation in progress (2026): migrations 002-007, auth, categories, expenses, incomes, invoices, dashboard summary API and handlers
Cursor project rule .cursor/rules/aim-knowledge-graph-sync.mdc keeps Aim MCP graph in sync with sessions
Manual test plan for M1 lives at docs/test-plans/milestone-1.md (draft)

Milestone 1 (MVP Core) implemented in codebase as of subagent delivery: full JWT auth, categories, expenses/incomes/invoices CRUD with filters and dashboard summary; service tests passing with ~78% coverage on internal/services

M1 independent code review (code-reviewer): verdict Request Changes — no deploy blocker for single-user dev; follow-up themes: configurable CORS origin, map service errors to correct HTTP status (avoid leaking DB strings as 400), fix Expenses/Income edit modal close after update, clean auth ValidateToken dead branch, dashboard unpaid/overdue amount fields vs API contract
Post-review fixes applied in repo: ExpensesPage/IncomePage close form after successful edit; LoginPage uses Navigate when already authenticated (avoids navigate during render)

QA M1 verification (curl + tests) logged in docs/test-plans/milestone-1.md; five defects D-01–D-05 addressed in code: default expense/income date when omitted, ISO date_from/date_to validation on list endpoints, invoice PUT preserves status when omitted, list per_page clamped in handlers for accurate metadata, dashboard/invoice stats populate unpaid_amount and overdue_amount
Browser MCP QA defects B-01–B-03 addressed: login 401 no longer full-page redirects (client.ts); list date columns use formatDisplayDate; forms use toInputDate + sync effect for RFC3339 API dates
Manual test plan for Milestone 2 (file attachments, enhanced lists, categories) is at docs/test-plans/milestone-2.md — draft dated 2026-04-26; traceability TS-25 through TS-40 per QA delivery

Milestone 2 implementation delivered in repo: attachments (migration 008, AttachmentService/handler, cascade delete on entity deletes), category CRUD + delete reassignment, expense sort params, invoice date_field + check-overdue endpoint, frontend FileUpload/AttachmentList and CategoriesPage; backend tests and frontend build reported passing at delivery

Code-reviewer pre-merge pass on M2 working tree (2026): verdict Request Changes — MIME detection must not trust client Content-Type alone; image previews need auth-aware fetch (img src lacks Bearer); cascade delete should wrap attachment DB deletes + parent delete in one DB tx; validate entity_id exists on upload; tighten error mapping and Content-Disposition filename; AC gap on list attachment count indicator; add service tests for new logic

Stakeholder/developer doc for planned database/sql → GORM migration: docs/framework-update-gorm.md (draft 2026-04-26); BA delivery recommends keeping embedded SQL migrations as source of truth with AutoMigrate limited to tests

Backend refactored from database/sql to GORM (gorm.io): Open runs embedded SQL migrations then opens GORM on same SQLite DSN; services/handlers/health/tests use *gorm.DB; go test and go vet reported clean at delivery — align docs/framework-update-gorm.md with implementation if wording drifted

name: Backend
observations: Entry point: backend/cmd/server/main.go
SQLite embedded DB via mattn/go-sqlite3 with WAL mode and foreign keys
Architecture: handlers → services → database/storage layers in internal/
All monetary amounts stored as int64 minor currency units (cents), never floats
Default port 8080, configurable via PORT env var
Go REST API using net/http with Go 1.22+ patterns; health at GET /api/health with database, storage, and storage_type fields
Configurable storage: internal/storage ObjectStore — LocalStorage (STORAGE_TYPE=local, LOCAL_STORAGE_PATH) or MinIOStorage S3-compatible (STORAGE_TYPE=s3); wired in cmd/server/main.go
Versioned SQL migrations in backend/migrations, RunMigrations from embed.FS
CLAUDE.md documents CGO: SQLite driver mattn/go-sqlite3 may need CGO_ENABLED=1 if go run fails to open the database without a C toolchain build.
internal/handlers: auth_handler, category_handler, expense_handler, income_handler, invoice_handler, dashboard_handler, health
internal/services: auth_service, category_service, expense_service, income_service, invoice_service, dashboard_service
cmd/server/main.go registers routes and AuthMiddleware on /api except login/logout/health

name: Frontend
observations: React 19 + TypeScript 6 with Vite 8
Source in frontend/src/{components,pages,api,types}/
Dev server: npm run dev, Build: tsc -b && vite build

App shell implemented: React Router, AppLayout/AuthLayout, placeholder pages (Dashboard, Expenses, Income, Invoices, Categories, Settings, Login, NotFound), Sidebar with responsive behavior, Toast stack + context
Typed api client (src/api/client.ts), useAuth, VITE_API_BASE_URL
M0-04 responsive shell: Sidebar wrapped in .sidebar-root so AppLayout flex does not reserve desktop width when aside is position:fixed off-canvas at max-width 767px; ☰ opens drawer (TS-04-06).
Milestone 0 visual verification screenshots and status notes live under docs/milestone-00/ (PNG + status.md).
Pages include login, dashboard, expenses, income, invoices, categories, settings; ProtectedRoute and useAuth for JWT
API modules under src/api for auth, categories, expenses, incomes, invoices, dashboard

name: Infrastructure
observations: Docker Compose with MinIO service on ports 9000/9001
MinIO credentials: minioadmin/minioadmin (dev)
Makefile with targets: dev-backend, dev-frontend, minio, dev
GitHub Actions CI: .github/workflows/ci.yml — go vet/build/test and npm lint/build
Docker Compose: backend + frontend + minio; backend uses STORAGE_TYPE=s3; MinIO healthcheck before backend starts
GitHub Actions includes backend-s3-smoke job: Docker MinIO + built server with STORAGE_TYPE=s3 asserts /api/health returns storage ok and storage_type s3.
.github/workflows/ci.yml gates backend vet/build/test and frontend lint/build; optional S3 smoke with MinIO
.github/workflows/ci.yml backend jobs set CGO_ENABLED=1 for mattn/go-sqlite3 (vet/build/test and S3 smoke build)

name: An_Hoang
observations: Project owner and sole developer
Email: beohoang98@gmail.com
Learning Go (repo is under learn-go directory)
Uses Claude Code with specialized agents for planning and implementation

name: Requirements_Doc
observations: Full PRD with 8 epics including Epic 8: Document Scanning (OCR)
46+ user stories, 5 milestones (M0-M4), NFRs NF-01 through NF-27
Data model: users, categories, expenses, incomes, invoices, attachments, scan_results
MoSCoW prioritization applied
Located at docs/requirements.md (v1.2+); includes §4.2.1 Storage Configuration (STORAGE_TYPE, paths, health per mode)

name: Tickets_Doc
observations: Covers milestones M0 through M4 with backend/frontend tasks and acceptance criteria
Includes API route summary appendix and migration order appendix (001-010)
QA review graded B+ with 3 critical and 5 major issues identified in docs/tickets-review.md
Critical issues: routing conflict /api/invoices/summary vs /:id, backup endpoint deferred too late, duplicate overdue logic
Epic 8 (Document Scanning) tickets not yet added to this file
Located at docs/tickets.md — ~2300+ lines; M0-02/M0-06/M0-07/E7-S1 updated for configurable storage and ObjectStore naming

name: Milestones
observations: M1: MVP Core — expenses, incomes, categories CRUD
M3: Reports + Document Scanning — analytics, OCR via vision LLM
M4: Polish — UX improvements, backup/restore, performance
M0: Complete — migrations runner, config, middleware, health, Docker stack, CI, frontend routing + API client foundation
M2: File attachments — configurable storage backend (local or S3/MinIO), not MinIO-only
M3 combines reports/charts (should) with document scanning / vision LLM (Epic 8)
M4 polish: backup endpoint GET /api/backup (NF-13), performance, UX refinements per tickets
M1 MVP Core: implemented (auth, CRUD, filters, dashboard, M1-01 tests) pending human smoke + CI CGO check

name: Document_Scanning
observations: Epic 8 in requirements — import images and scan bills/invoices
Uses vision LLM API (Claude Vision) server-side, no on-device OCR
Requirements added to docs/requirements.md but detailed tickets not yet in docs/tickets.md
Planned for M3 milestone
Uses server-side vision API; NF-22 through NF-27 constrain keys, timeouts, and graceful degradation
SC-06: scan never auto-creates records without explicit user submit

name: Claude_Agents
observations: Three custom agents in .claude/agents/
business-analyst: requirements analysis, feature planning, task breakdown
fullstack-tech-lead: technical implementation across Go backend and React frontend
qa-ux-tester: testing, UX review, Playwright automation, doc review
Agents used heavily to parallelize planning, implementation, and review
Fourth agent code-reviewer in .claude/agents/code-reviewer.md — adversarial PR review, same stack context as tech-lead
Invoke in Claude Code with @"code-reviewer (agent)"
CLAUDE.md documents four agents: business-analyst, fullstack-tech-lead, code-reviewer, qa-ux-tester (supersedes earlier three-agent wording in graph)

name: JWT_Auth
observations: Single-user login; no registration (AU-08)
POST /api/auth/login and POST /api/auth/logout; other /api routes require Bearer JWT
Passwords hashed with bcrypt; JWT_SECRET from env
Default seed user admin/changeme from migration 002

name: Expense_Feature
observations: CRUD REST under /api/expenses with Go 1.22 path patterns
List supports pagination, date_from/date_to, category_id or category_ids, returns total_amount
Amounts int64 minor units; FK to categories type expense
Service: internal/services/expense_service.go

name: Income_Feature
observations: CRUD REST under /api/incomes mirroring expenses
List filters and total_amount like expenses; category must be income type
Service: internal/services/income_service.go

name: Invoice_Feature
observations: CRUD plus PATCH /api/invoices/{id}/status for mark paid
GET /api/invoices/stats for outstanding totals (avoids /:id conflict)
Statuses unpaid | paid | overdue; overdue updated on list/startup per tickets
Fields: vendor_name, amount, issue_date, due_date, status, description

name: Category_Feature
observations: GET /api/categories?type=expense|income
Seeded defaults in migrations 003-004; unique name per type

name: Dashboard_Feature
observations: GET /api/dashboard/summary with date range; returns total_income, total_expenses, net_balance
Includes unpaid/overdue invoice counts and amounts in DashboardSummary model

name: ObjectStore
observations: internal/storage: ObjectStore interface; LocalStorage vs MinIO S3
STORAGE_TYPE=local|s3; opaque storage_key in DB for files (attachments in later milestones)
Health check reports storage_type

name: M1_MVP_Core
observations: Milestone 1 from docs/tickets.md: auth, categories, expense/income/invoice CRUD and filters, dashboard cards, service tests M1-01
No file attachments UI in scope for core MVP path until M2
Status: delivered in repo per tech-lead run — backend+frontend wired; human should run manual smoke (admin/changeme) and confirm CI sets CGO_ENABLED=1

name: M2_Attachments
observations: Per requirements FA-* and tickets: polymorphic attachments, upload/download, cascade delete with storage
Depends on ObjectStore already present

name: Data_Model_Core
observations: SQLite tables: users, categories, expenses, incomes, invoices (see requirements data model)
Polymorphic attachments and scan_results planned post-M1

name: M3_Reports_Scanning
observations: Per Milestones entity: analytics, charts (DB-04/05 should), document scanning with vision LLM
Builds on attachments (M2) for SC-10 image attachment to saved records

name: M4_Polish
observations: Backup/restore, performance, UX polish per docs/tickets.md
GET /api/backup streams SQLite file per NF-13

name: Vision_Scanning_Flow
observations: SC-01 to SC-06: upload image, server calls vision API, JSON review form, explicit save
Not yet implemented in codebase as of M1 track — requirements Epic 8

name: File_Attachments_Flow
observations: FA-01 through FA-05: PDF/JPEG/PNG, 10MB max, storage_key, cascade delete from parent entity
Milestone 2 scope; attachments table not in early M1 migrations
